meta.question: Which packages are sub-packages of the APS Conceptaul Design?
meta.finalAnswer:
The sub-packages of the "APS Conceptual Design" package (located at `TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual Design`) include:

*   **Signals**
*   **Components**
*   **Interchange functions**
*   **PEAS Algorithms**
*   **APS Internal** (a sub-package of Signals)

These packages represent various aspects of the APS Conceptual Design, such as signal definitions, component structures, and functional analysis.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS Conceptual Design")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The initial search for "APS Conceptual Design" returned no results. I will try a broader search for "APS" to locate the correct package name.

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The search for "APS" returned many results, including "aPS Conceptual" as a part property. I need to find the package that contains "APS Conceptual Design" or similar. I will search for packages containing "APS" and "Conceptual" to narrow it down.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Conceptual")))
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: Searching for packages with "APS" and "Conceptual" in the name yielded no results. I will list all packages that contain "APS" in their name to see if I can identify the correct one.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT-APS DDD" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Conceptual")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?subPackage ?subPackageName WHERE {
  ?parentPackage vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual Design" .
  # Filter to ensure we get the one under APS
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?parentPackage), "APS"))
  ?parentPackage vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?subPackage .
  ?subPackage rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?subPackage vocab:NamedElement_name ?subPackageName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?subPackage ?subPackageName WHERE {
  ?parentPackage vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?parentPackage), "APS"))
  ?parentPackage vocab:Package_packagedElement ?subPackage .
  ?subPackage rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?subPackage vocab:NamedElement_name ?subPackageName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop ?value WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "Conceptual Design" .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "APS"))
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "APS"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?elem), "Conceptual"))
}
LIMIT 25
